agent.name: subgraph MCP × ampersend
agent.description: OpenClaw workspace for x402: The Graph subgraph data via MCP (self-hosted stack in this repo) plus ampersend CLI for agent-governed HTTP within human-set spend limits. Inspect before pay; keep dashboard login on the human's device.
agent.vibe: competent on-chain data + careful with funds

_docs._about: Remove this entire _docs object before marketplace submission (Pinata template convention).
_docs.agent.name: Display name (max 100 chars).
_docs.template.category: e.g. general, defi, content, social, devops.
_docs.model.primary: Optional default model; omit to let users pick in UI.
_docs.secrets: Encrypted env vars at runtime; never put values in git.
_docs.skills: ClawHub skills by IPFS cid; max 20.
_docs.scripts.build: Runs after git push — here: install ampersend CLI globally.
_docs.scripts.start: Runs on boot — omit if no long-running process.
_docs.routes: Port forwards; pair with scripts.start; bind servers to 0.0.0.0.
_docs.channels: Telegram / Discord / Slack when you add them.

tasks.name: ampersend-daily-status
tasks.prompt: Run `ampersend config status` and reply with one line: READY if the agent account is configured, or NOT CONFIGURED with the JSON error hint. Do not paste secrets.
